title: Senior Software Engineer - Zensar Technologies - Freshers Welcome

jsonLd.title: Senior Software Engineer - Zensar Technologies - Freshers Welcome
jsonLd.description:
Zensar Technologies, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Senior Software Engineer for our Coimbatore operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Zensar Technologies:
Zensar Technologies is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in Docker

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Coimbatore, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Zensar Technologies!
